workflow: RupeeKit Workflow 9 Scheduler - Daily Final Social Posting Pack
toolName: Income Tax Calculator: Old vs New Regime India (FY 2023-24)

facebook.copy: Navigating India's income tax regimes can be complex. Are you weighing your options between the Old and New Tax Regimes for FY 2023-24? Our Income Tax Calculator helps you compare your estimated tax liability under both. Understand the impact of deductions like HRA, 80C, and home loan interest on your potential tax savings. Use this educational tool to make an informed choice for your financial planning. Get your personalized estimate today at https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/income-tax-calculator-old-vs-new-regime-india.
manualInstructions: Create a RupeeKit Facebook Page post.
Attach the Facebook final PNG image.
Paste the copy and hashtags.
Use the calculator URL once.
Do not boost or buy traffic during test phase.

instagram.caption: Choosing between the Old and New Tax Regimes for FY 2023-24? It's a key decision for your finances! Our Income Tax Calculator simplifies the comparison, showing you estimated tax liabilities under both options. See how your deductions like HRA and 80C can make a difference in your potential tax outflow. Use this tool for informational planning and make an informed choice. Plan smarter with RupeeKit. https://www.rupeeKit.co.in/tools/income-tax-calculator-old-vs-new-regime-india

Upload the Instagram final PNG image for a normal single-image post.

Do not upload the raw logo separately to Gemini/Nano Banana.
Tell Gemini/Nano Banana to keep the top-right RupeeKit logo unchanged.

Do not use personal identity or personal profile.
